features.name: blocking assignment to local variable inside function
features.description: Code should include a function with a blocking assignment to a local variable that returns a value
features.snippet: function logic [31:0] toto(); logic [31:0] res; res = 10; return res; endfunction

features.name: function call in sequential always block with blocking assignment context
features.description: Code should include a function call invoked from a sequential always block alongside a non-blocking assignment
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin b <= 0; if(state != 2) b <= toto(); end

features.name: BLKSEQ warning false positive for function blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a function with a local variable that uses a blocking assignment to trigger an erroneous BLKSEQ warning
features.snippet: function logic [31:0] toto(); logic [31:0] res; res = 10; return res; endfunction
